TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot API token used by the plugin to authenticate and start the Telegram client.

FRONTEND_URL.description: Base URL of the frontend application, used to construct authentication link buttons in Telegram messages.

TELEGRAM_API_ROOT.description: Base URL for Telegram Bot API that TelegramService will use to send requests. Allows overriding the default Telegram API endpoint (e.g., when using a proxy or self-hosted instance).

TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHATS.description: JSON-encoded array of chat IDs that are permitted to interact with the bot. Used for authorization checks.

TELEGRAM_TEST_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram chat ID used by the test suite to send, receive, and validate messages during Telegram bot tests.
